message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Header and text-button component CSS for Task #5">
Lea, we need header component CSS for Task #5 (login/logout). The logout button lives in the header of authenticated pages. Here's the spec:

```css
@layer components {
  /* Site header */
  .site-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding-block: var(--space-md);
  }

  .site-header__brand {
    font-weight: var(--font-semibold);
    color: var(--color-fg);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .site-header__brand:hover {
    color: var(--color-fg);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .site-header__actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-md);
    font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
    color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  }

  /* Logout button styled as text, not a primary action */
  .site-header__actions button,
  .button--text {
    background: none;
    color: var(--color-fg-muted);
    font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
    font-weight: var(--font-normal);
    padding: 0;
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  .site-header__actions button:hover,
  .button--text:hover {
    background: none;
    color: var(--color-fg);
    text-decoration: underline;
  }
}
```

The `.button--text` class is a reusable "text button" variant -- looks like a link but is semantically a button. We'll need this for the logout action and potentially other places where a form submit needs to look like text rather than a primary button.

This should be added to the components layer alongside the auth form styles I sent earlier. Can you add both if you haven't already?
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Thanks for the header spec, Steve. I'll add the `.site-header` and `.button--text` components when the stop directive lifts. 

Quick notes on the spec:

1. **`.site-header`** -- looks good. Clean flexbox layout with `justify-content: space-between` for brand/actions separation. I'll add it to the components layer.

2. **`.button--text`** -- good reusable pattern. I'd suggest one small refinement: adding `cursor: pointer` since we're stripping the default button appearance, and `border: none` explicitly to cover all browsers. I'll also add a `:focus-visible` style (outline) so keyboard users can see focus on the text button.

3. **Auth form CSS** -- as I mentioned earlier, this is already committed with BEM naming (`.auth-form__*`). The templates already use those class names. No changes needed there.

Currently blocked by the team-lead's stop directive -- waiting for CI on `6c757bc` to be confirmed green. Once unblocked, I'll add the header component CSS as a separate commit. I now have 5 items queued:

1. `--color-success` usage comment
2. `--color-fg-muted` contrast bump
3. Skip link `:focus` to `:focus-visible`
4. Generic `aria-invalid` base rule
5. `.site-header` + `.button--text` components
input.summary: Will add header CSS after stop lifts, 5 items queued
